testimonials.text: Love, love, love this range especially the Moroccan spice range smells so good and leaves your skin feeling amazing!
Massage oil is amazing. I use it every day for my skin as I am very dry, love the smell.
Beautiful products. Aiming to get the whole range.
Amazing, use it every day and get complimented daily. All-time favorite Moroccan spice body lotion.
After grouting tiles my hands were extremely rough. I tried By Celeste foot scrub on my hands — OMG what a difference! Followed with hand cream and my hands feel fantastic.
Really beautiful products - will definitely be a return user - nothing I don't love!
Very impressed and has personalized touch.
Love the handmade organic soaps and lotions. They leave your skin feeling beautiful and knowing it is all organic gives me peace of mind.
All natural and fantastic the way all the products make your skin feel.
The products are fantastic, so gentle on the skin and smell amazing! The clay is the best face mask I have ever used.
The oils & creams are amazing, you can smell it all day.
The products are divine. The shampoo soap bar makes my hair feel amazing.
Love the handmade organic soaps and lotions. Beautiful and chemical-free.
For someone with eczema, these products are 5 star :)
I love the soaps and face sprays — especially when kept in the fridge in summer.
The FAMILY TENDER cream is incredible. Works where nothing else did. Highly recommend.
